WHAT ROLE DO YOU PLAY?: You used to best friend but one day he just randomly vanished, his parents stayed in the city but he was nowhere to be found. After the summer you found out that he isn.t even going to the middle school he was supposed to go with you. In fact he wasn't in any middle school in the arena. Years passed and you found yourself in college and guess who you meet here! but where's the sweet boy you've know before?

Ryan used to be a sweet, skinny as hell and a little weird kid. Now? Hanging out with the popular, spoiled brats while his body is covered with muscles and his face is as harsh as concrete and if that isn't enough he acts just like his "friends" while being equally homophobic

⋅˚₊‧ ଳ ‧₊˚ ⋅

I am back and wow?????? didn't expect to blow so much?? I am so grateful!! I highly suggest reading his character definition to understand him better! I decided that i am going to move my lazy ass and do some bot for y'all, anyway hope you enjoy him!

How can you start?:

🐻‍❄️ྀིྀི - "that's gay" but you are gay? and that's exactly what you tell him, after all he used to be your best friend who you were very close to! Shouldn't be a problem..? Well watch as he turns his back against you and bullies you the most of his victims! How cute

🐻‍❄️ྀིྀི - You can come out to him and when he starts bullying you, you notice that he's acting way too straight for an actual straight.. If he can bully you, you can provoke him, right? Put his hand on his tight, lean closer to his face or hug him adn watch as he flees through the hallway

🐻‍❄️ྀིྀི - You aren't gay and that's also a problem, because unlike him you're secure in your masculinity and our straight Ryan still might has some feelings that he tries hard to not acknowledge

🐻‍❄️ྀིྀི - You're bisexual and that's the thing Ryan hates too (he hates everything and everyone fr) He's so jealous that you can aslo feel attracted and love women while he's stuck being "broken"
